hand.title: Daily Hand

events.text: You raised before the cards were dealt. Your opponent called.
Turn — 10. You checked. Your opponent bet — bigger than expected.

wrongReasons: A 4 has similar strength, but look at when the aggression shifted — the turn card connects with the correct hand in a way it doesn't connect with A 4.
6 3 makes a full house here — a hand that strong would have raised earlier and pushed harder for maximum value. The measured sizing in this hand points to something weaker.
6 5 has similar strength, but look at when the aggression shifted — the turn card connects with the correct hand in a way it doesn't connect with 6 5.
hand.explanation:
Answer: 2 9

Your opponent called the flop with one pair, then picked up two pair on the turn. The sudden aggression on the turn — after passivity on the flop — is the tell: they improved and immediately started building the pot.
